title: Migrating from Netlify to Pages
excerpt: description: Learn how to migrate from Netlify to Cloudflare. This guide includes instructions for migrating redirects and headers. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. In this tutorial, you will learn how to migrate your Netlify application to Cloudflare Pages. To move your application to Cloudflare Pages, find your build command and build directory. Cloudflare Pages will use this information to build and deploy your application.
